cards.title: Etched AI Chip Startup Hits $5B Valuation
cards.body: Nvidia competitor Etched has reached a $5 billion valuation with $1 billion in contracts already booked for its inference chip systems. The company is positioning itself as a major alternative in the AI hardware space.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Sonnet 5 Model
cards.body: Claude Sonnet 5 delivers stronger agentic capabilities with lower pricing and improved safety features. The model positions itself as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

cards.title: Acti Brings AI Agents to Smartphone Keyboards
cards.body: Acti's new iOS and Android keyboard integrates AI assistants directly into your device's input layer. Users can create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language across all apps.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Science for Researchers
cards.body: Claude Science is a dedicated workbench that consolidates computational research tools into one environment. Scientists can eliminate the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and separate applications.

cards.title: X Launches MCP Server for AI Integration
cards.body: X has released a hosted Model Context Protocol server to streamline AI tool integration. Developers can now more easily connect AI applications with X's API platform.

cards.title: Riverside Adds AI Newsletter Publishing Feature
cards.body: The podcasting platform now lets users generate AI-powered newsletters directly from their recordings. The feature automates content repurposing for podcast creators.

cards.title: Amazon Launches $1 Billion AI Deployment Team
cards.body: Amazon created a new $1 billion frontline deployment engineering organization to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic. Engineers will embed within companies to deploy custom AI agents with focus on rapid implementation.

cards.title: Proton's Lumo 2.0 Privacy AI Chatbot Launches
cards.body: Proton upgrades its privacy-focused Lumo AI chatbot with expanded capabilities. Lumo 2.0 rolls out this week with broader functionality.

cards.title: OKX Launches AI Agent Hiring Marketplace
cards.body: The crypto exchange is building a marketplace where AI agents can hire and pay each other. OKX combines payments, identity, and reputation systems for autonomous agent transactions.

cards.title: High-Intensity AI Adopters Increase Hiring
cards.body: New research shows companies heavily adopting AI saw headcount grow 10.2%, contradicting fears of mass job cuts. Entry-level positions rose 12% among high-intensity AI adopters.

cards.title: Base44 Launches Custom AI Model
cards.body: Wix-owned vibe-coding platform Base44 begins rolling out its proprietary AI model. The startup aims to eventually outperform frontier models for competitive defensibility.

cards.title: Google Gemini Image Generation Goes Free
cards.body: Google expanded personalized AI image generation to eligible free Gemini users in the U.S. The feature creates images based on user interests and connected Google app data.

cards.title: Anthropic and California Government Partnership
cards.body: Anthropic forges deal with California government to provide Claude at 50% discount. The partnership deepens ties between the AI company and state leadership.

cards.title: South Korea Commits $550B to Memory Production
cards.body: The world's two largest memory chip companies pledge over $550 billion to address 'RAMageddon' chip shortages. South Korea positions itself as a global AI tech powerhouse.

cards.title: Arena AI Leaderboard Becomes $100M Business
cards.body: Arena, the popular free AI model leaderboard, has grown into a $100 million business. The startup launched its commercial service just last September.

cards.title: Cursor Releases Mobile Coding Agent App
cards.body: Cursor launched a mobile app for remote management of coding agents. Users can now oversee AI coding assistants while on the go.

cards.title: TIDAL Cracks Down on AI Music
cards.body: TIDAL cuts off monetization for AI-generated content and will remove impersonation tracks. The streaming service uses automated tools to police AI music.

cards.title: Proception Robot Hand Startup Raises $11M
cards.body: Proception settles Tesla trade secret lawsuit and announces $11 million funding round. The startup uses unique data collection methods to tackle robotics' hardest problem: hands.

cards.title: Omen AI Raises $31M for Data Center Cooling
cards.body: Omen AI secured a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant systems in data centers. The platform prevents bacterial outbreaks and optimizes data center efficiency.

cards.title: Ford Rehires Engineers After AI Disappointment
cards.body: Ford brought back experienced engineers after AI implementation fell short on product quality. The company realized introducing AI alone couldn't guarantee high-quality vehicle production.

cards.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation
cards.body: Etched, an AI chip competitor to Nvidia, has booked $1 billion in contracts for its inference systems. The milestone signals growing demand for alternative AI chip architectures.

cards.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 for agents
cards.body: Claude Sonnet 5 delivers stronger agentic capabilities at lower pricing than Opus and GPT-5.5. The model includes improved safety features for autonomous AI applications.

cards.title: Acti brings AI agents to smartphone keyboards
cards.body: Acti's new iOS and Android keyboard integrates AI assistants directly into device input. Users can create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language across all apps.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Science targets researchers
cards.body: Claude Science provides scientists a unified workbench for computational research without switching between tools. The platform consolidates databases, pipelines, and analysis in one environment.

cards.title: X launches MCP server for AI developers
cards.body: X's hosted MCP server simplifies API integration for AI applications. Developers can now more easily connect their tools to X's platform.

cards.title: Amazon launches $1 billion FDE AI org
cards.body: Amazon's new team embeds engineers within companies to deploy purpose-built AI agents. The focus is on rapid deployment and enabling customer self-sufficiency.

cards.title: Proton's Lumo 2.0 privacy AI chatbot upgrades
cards.body: Lumo 2.0 expands capabilities for Proton's privacy-focused AI chatbot. The upgrade maintains focus on user data protection.

cards.title: OKX builds marketplace for AI agent payments
cards.body: OKX is creating an economy where AI agents can hire and pay each other. The platform combines payments, identity, and reputation systems.

cards.title: AI adoption increases entry-level job growth
cards.body: A new report shows high-intensity AI adopters grew headcount by 10.2%, with entry-level roles rising 12%. The finding counters claims that AI eliminates junior positions.

cards.title: Base44 launches proprietary AI model
cards.body: Wix-owned vibe-coding platform Base44 is rolling out its own AI model to compete with frontier models. The move reflects broader AI startup focus on defensibility.

cards.title: Gemini's personalized AI image generation free
cards.body: Google expanded personalized image generation to eligible free Gemini users in the U.S. The feature creates images based on user interests and connected Google app data.

cards.title: Anthropic and California forge AI pricing deal
cards.body: Anthropic negotiated a California government contract offering Claude at 50% discount. The partnership signals growing state adoption of the OpenAI alternative.

cards.title: Arena AI leaderboard reaches $100M valuation
cards.body: Arena, the popular free AI leaderboard, launched a commercial service last September and achieved unicorn status. The platform rates and compares AI models for researchers.

cards.title: Cursor adds mobile app for coding agents
cards.body: Cursor launched a mobile application for remote oversight of AI coding agents. The tool enables developers to guide agents while away from their desk.

cards.title: Proception robot hands startup raises $11M
cards.body: Proception developed unique approaches to collecting training data for robotic hands—a hard unsolved problem. The startup settled a Tesla trade secret suit before the funding round.

cards.title: Omen AI optimizes data centers with AI
cards.body: Omen AI raised $31 million Series A to use AI monitoring for chip coolant systems. The platform prevents bacterial outbreaks in data center infrastructure.

cards.title: Ford rehires engineers as AI falls short
cards.body: Ford brought back experienced 'gray beard' engineers after AI-generated designs failed quality standards. The automaker acknowledged AI alone cannot produce high-quality products.

cards.title: AI agents are not your coworkers
cards.body: MIT Technology Review explores how companies mischaracterize AI agents as teammates despite fundamental differences. The terminology obscures AI limitations in autonomous decision-making.

cards.title: Agriculture ready for AI data infrastructure
cards.body: AI transforms agriculture but industry leaders must establish data groundwork before investing in AI. The sector faces challenges with volatile costs and unpredictable weather patterns.

cards.title: Enterprise AI investment hits inflection point
cards.body: Gartner calls 2026 an 'inflection year' for aligning AI projects with business strategy. Organizations increasingly turn to agentic AI to demonstrate measurable ROI.

cards.title: AI reshapes retail decision-making infrastructure
cards.body: Artificial intelligence is transforming behind-the-scenes retail decisions on product search rankings and inventory management. The shift may matter more than consumer-facing chatbots or virtual try-ons.

cards.title: Trump's .gov website AI redesign criticized
cards.body: AI-designed government websites under Trump's plan revealed significant usability problems. The approach raised concerns about applying AI to public-facing digital infrastructure.
